metadata.title: CensusBaselineItem — a single named census baseline record

description: Represents one entry from the CensusHistory baseline registry. Used as an element in CensusBaselineListResponse.baselines and as the payload in CensusBaselineCreateResponse.baseline. Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class CensusBaselineItem.

snapshot_file.description: Repo-relative path to the census snapshot JSON file this baseline points to.

git_commit.description: Git commit SHA recorded at baseline creation time. Null if not captured.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the baseline was registered.
